## Rule affected
<!-- Section + line in conventions.md, or "new rule" -->

## Problem
<!-- What situation does the current rule handle poorly? -->

## Example
**Source:**
```
[paste source text]
```

**Current translation:**
```
[paste current output]
```

**Proposed translation:**
```
[paste proposed output]
```

## Behavioral evidence
<!-- What agent output changes with the proposed rule? Describe or paste test results. -->

## Token impact
<!-- Does the proposed change increase or decrease token count? By how much? -->
